thi16:1.0.450: p_19Th2_538Mantāvatiyā nagare,Rañño koñcassa aggamahesiyā;Dhītā āsiṁ sumedhā,Pasāditā sāsanakarehi.
thi16:1.0.451: p_19Th2_539Sīlavatī cittakathā,Bahussutā buddhasāsane vinitā;Mātāpitaro upagamma,Bhaṇati "ubhayo nisāmetha.
thi16:1.0.452: p_19Th2_540Nibbānābhiratāhaṁ,Asassataṁ bhavagataṁ yadipi dibbaṁ;Kimaṅgaṁ panatucchā kāmā,Appassādā bahuvighātā.
thi16:1.0.453: p_19Th2_541Kāmā kaṭukā āsī,Visūpamā yesu mucchitā bālā;Te dīgharattaṁ niraye,Samappitāhaññante dukkhitā.
thi16:1.0.454: p_19Th2_542Socanti pāpakammā,Vinipāte pāpavaddhino sadā;Kāyena ca vācāya ca,Manasā ca asaṁvutā bālā.
thi16:1.0.455: p_19Th2_543Bālā te duppaññā,Acetanā dukkhasamudayoruddhā;Desente ajānantā,Na bujjhare ariyasaccāni.
thi16:1.0.456: p_19Th2_544Saccāni amma buddhavaradesitāni,Te bahutarā ajānantā ye;Abhinandanti bhavagataṁ,Pihenti devesu upapattiṁ.
thi16:1.0.457: p_19Th2_545Devesupi upapatti,Asassatā bhavagate aniccamhi;Na ca santasanti bālā,Punappunaṁ jāyitabbassa.
thi16:1.0.458: p_19Th2_546Cattāro vinipātā,Duveca gatiyo kathañci labbhanti;Na ca vinipātagatānaṁ,Pabbajjā atthi nirayesu.
thi16:1.0.459: p_19Th2_547Anujānātha maṁ ubhayo,Pabbajituṁ dasabalassa pāvacane;Appossukkā ghaṭissaṁ,Jātimaraṇappahānāya.
thi16:1.0.461: p_19Th2_549Buddhānaṁ uppādo vivajjito,Akkhaṇo khaṇo laddho;Sīlāni brahmacariyaṁ,Yāvajīvaṁ na dūseyyaṁ".
thi16:1.0.462: p_19Th2_550Evaṁ bhaṇati sumedhā,Mātāpitaro "na tāva āhāraṁ;Āharissaṁgahaṭṭhā,Māraṇavasaṁ gatāva hessāmi".
thi16:1.0.463: p_19Th2_551Mātā dukkhitā rodati pitā ca,Assā sabbaso samabhihato;Ghaṭenti saññāpetuṁ,Pāsādatale chamāpatitaṁ.
thi16:1.0.464: p_19Th2_552"Uṭṭhehi puttaka kiṁ soci,Tena dinnāsi vāraṇavatimhi;Rājāanīkaratto,Abhirūpo tassa tvaṁ dinnā.
thi16:1.0.465: p_19Th2_553Aggamahesī bhavissasi,Anikarattassa rājino bhariyā;Sīlāni brahmacariyaṁ,Pabbajjā dukkarā puttaka.
thi16:1.0.466: p_19Th2_554Rajje āṇā dhanamissariyaṁ,Bhogā sukhā daharikāsi;Bhuñjāhi kāmabhoge,Vāreyyaṁ hotu te putta".
thi16:1.0.467: p_19Th2_555Atha ne bhaṇati sumedhā,"Mā edisikāni bhavagatamasāraṁ;Pabbajjā vā hohiti,Māraṇaṁ vā me na ceva vāreyyaṁ.
thi16:1.0.468: p_19Th2_556Kimiva pūtikāyamasuciṁ,Savanagandhaṁ bhayānakaṁ kuṇapaṁ;Abhisaṁviseyyaṁ bhastaṁ,Asakiṁ paggharitaṁ asucipuṇṇaṁ.
thi16:1.0.469: p_19Th2_557Kimiva tahaṁ jānantī,Vikūlakaṁ maṁsasoṇitupalittaṁ;Kimikulālayaṁ sakuṇabhattaṁ,Kaḷevaraṁ kissa diyyati.
thi16:1.0.470: p_19Th2_558Nibbuyhati susānaṁ,Aciraṁ kāyo apetaviññāṇo;Chuddhokaḷiṅgaraṁ viya,Jigucchamānehi ñātīhi.
thi16:1.0.473: p_19Th2_561Yo naṁ vinibbhujitvā,Abbhantaramassa bāhiraṁ kayirā;Gandhassa asahamānā,Sakāpi mātā jiguccheyya.
thi16:1.0.474: p_19Th2_562Khandhadhātuāyatanaṁ,Saṅkhataṁ jātimūlakaṁ dukkhaṁ;Yoniso anuvicinantī,Vāreyyaṁ kissa iccheyyaṁ.
thi16:1.0.475: p_19Th2_563Divase divase tisatti,Satāni navanavā pateyyuṁ kāyamhi;Vassasatampi ca ghāto,Seyyo dukkhassa cevaṁ khayo.
thi16:1.0.476: p_19Th2_564Ajjhupagacche ghātaṁ,Yo viññāyevaṁ satthuno vacanaṁ;‘Dīghotesaṁsaṁsāro,Punappunaṁ haññamānānaṁ’.
thi16:1.0.477: p_19Th2_565Devesu manussesu ca,Tiracchānayoniyā asurakāye;Petesu ca nirayesu ca,Aparimitā dissare ghātā.
thi16:1.0.479: p_19Th2_567Pattā te nibbānaṁ,Ye yuttā dasabalassa pāvacane;Appossukkā ghaṭenti,Jātimaraṇappahānāya.
thi16:1.0.480: p_19Th2_568Ajjeva tātabhinikkha-Missaṁ bhogehi kiṁ asārehi;Nibbinnā me kāmā,Vantasamā tālavatthukatā".
thi16:1.0.481: p_19Th2_569Sā cevaṁ bhaṇati pitara-Manīkaratto ca yassa sā dinnā;Upayāsi vāraṇavate,Vāreyyamupaṭṭhite kāle.
thi16:1.0.482: p_19Th2_570Atha asitanicitamuduke,Kese khaggena chindiya sumedhā;Pāsādaṁpidahitvā,Paṭhamajjhānaṁ samāpajji.
thi16:1.0.483: p_19Th2_571Sā ca tahiṁ samāpannā,Anīkaratto ca āgato nagaraṁ;Pāsādecasumedhā,Aniccasaññaṁsubhāveti.
thi16:1.0.484: p_19Th2_572Sā ca manasi karoti,Anīkaratto ca āruhī turitaṁ;Maṇikanakabhūsitaṅgo,Katañjalī yācati sumedhaṁ.
thi16:1.0.485: p_19Th2_573"Rajje āṇādhanamissa-Riyaṁ bhogā sukhā daharikāsi;Bhuñjāhi kāmabhoge,Kāmasukhā dullabhā loke.
thi16:1.0.486: p_19Th2_574Nissaṭṭhaṁ te rajjaṁ,Bhoge bhuñjassu dehi dānāni;Mā dummanā ahosi,Mātāpitaro te dukkhitā".
thi16:1.0.487: p_19Th2_575Taṁ taṁ bhaṇati sumedhā,Kāmehi anatthikā vigatamohā;"Mā kāme abhinandi,Kāmesvādīnavaṁ passa.
thi16:1.0.488: p_19Th2_576Cātuddīpo rājā,Mandhātā āsi kāmabhoginamaggo;Atitto kālaṅkato,Na cassa paripūritā icchā.
thi16:1.0.489: p_19Th2_577Satta ratanāni vasseyya,Vuṭṭhimā dasadisā samantena;Na catthi titti kāmānaṁ,Atittāva maranti narā.
thi16:1.0.491: p_19Th2_579Aniccā adhuvā kāmā,bahudukkhā mahāvisā;Ayoguḷova santatto,aghamūlā dukhapphalā.
thi16:1.0.493: p_19Th2_581Sattisūlūpamā kāmā,rogo gaṇḍo aghaṁ nighaṁ;Aṅgārakāsusadisā,aghamūlaṁ bhayaṁ vadho.
thi16:1.0.494: p_19Th2_582Evaṁ bahudukkhā kāmā,akkhātā antarāyikā;Gacchatha na me bhavagate,vissāso atthi attano.
thi16:1.0.495: p_19Th2_583Kiṁ mama paro karissati,Attano sīsamhi ḍayhamānamhi;Anubandhe jarāmaraṇe,Tassa ghātāya ghaṭitabbaṁ".
thi16:1.0.497: p_19Th2_585"Dīgho bālānaṁ saṁsāro,Punappunañca rodataṁ;Anamatagge pitu maraṇe,Bhātu vadhe attano ca vadhe.
thi16:1.0.498: p_19Th2_586Assu thaññaṁ rudhiraṁ,Saṁsāraṁ anamataggato saratha;Sattānaṁ saṁsarataṁ,Sarāhi aṭṭhīnañca sannicayaṁ.
thi16:1.0.499: p_19Th2_587Sara caturodadhī,Upanīte assuthaññarudhiramhi;Sara ekakappamaṭṭhīnaṁ,Sañcayaṁ vipulena samaṁ.
thi16:1.0.502: p_19Th2_590Sara kāṇakacchapaṁ pubba-Samudde aparato ca yugachiddaṁ;Siraṁtassa ca paṭimukkaṁ,Manussalābhamhi opammaṁ.
thi16:1.0.503: p_19Th2_591Sara rūpaṁ pheṇapiṇḍopa-Massa kāyakalino asārassa;Khandhe passa anicce,Sarāhi niraye bahuvighāte.
thi16:1.0.504: p_19Th2_592Sara kaṭasiṁ vaḍḍhente,Punappunaṁ tāsu tāsu jātīsu;Sara kumbhīlabhayāni ca,Sarāhi cattāri saccāni.
thi16:1.0.505: p_19Th2_593Amatamhi vijjamāne,Kiṁ tava pañcakaṭukena pītena;Sabbā hi kāmaratiyo,Kaṭukatarā pañcakaṭukena.
thi16:1.0.506: p_19Th2_594Amatamhi vijjamāne,Kiṁ tava kāmehi yepariḷāhā;Sabbā hi kāmaratiyo,Jalitā kuthitā kampitā santāpitā.
thi16:1.0.507: p_19Th2_595Asapattamhi samāne,Kiṁ tava kāmehi ye bahusapattā;Rājaggicoraudakappiyehi,Sādhāraṇā kāmā bahusapattā.
thi16:1.0.508: p_19Th2_596Mokkhamhi vijjamāne,Kiṁ tava kāmehi yesu vadhabandho;Kāmesu hi asakāmā,Vadhabandhadukhāni anubhonti.
thi16:1.0.509: p_19Th2_597Ādīpitā tiṇukkā,Gaṇhantaṁ dahanti neva muñcantaṁ;Ukkopamā hi kāmā,Dahanti ye te na muñcanti.
thi16:1.0.510: p_19Th2_598Mā appakassa hetu,Kāmasukhassa vipulaṁ jahī sukhaṁ;Mā puthulomova baḷisaṁ,Gilitvā pacchā vihaññasi.
thi16:1.0.511: p_19Th2_599Kāmaṁ kāmesu damassu,Tāva sunakhova saṅkhalābaddho;Kāhinti khu taṁ kāmā,Chātā sunakhaṁva caṇḍālā.
thi16:1.0.512: p_19Th2_600Aparimitañca dukkhaṁ,Bahūni ca cittadomanassāni;Anubhohisi kāmayutto,Paṭinissajaaddhuve kāme.
thi16:1.0.513: p_19Th2_601Ajaramhi vijjamāne,Kiṁ tava kāmehiyesu jarā;Māraṇabyādhigahitā,Sabbā sabbattha jātiyo.
thi16:1.0.515: p_19Th2_603Adhigatamidaṁ bahūhi,Amataṁ ajjāpi ca labhanīyamidaṁ;Yo yoniso payuñjati,Na ca sakkā aghaṭamānena".
thi16:1.0.516: p_19Th2_604Evaṁ bhaṇati sumedhā,Saṅkhāragate ratiṁ alabhamānā;Anunentī anikarattaṁ,Kese ca chamaṁ khipi sumedhā.
thi16:1.0.517: p_19Th2_605Uṭṭhāya anikaratto,Pañjaliko yācatassā pitaraṁ so;"Vissajjetha sumedhaṁ,Pabbajituṁ vimokkhasaccadassā".
thi16:1.0.518: p_19Th2_606Vissajjitā mātāpitūhi,pabbaji sokabhayabhītā;Cha abhiññā sacchikatā,aggaphalaṁ sikkhamānāya.
thi16:1.0.519: p_19Th2_607Acchariyamabbhutaṁ taṁ,Nibbānaṁ āsi rājakaññāya;Pubbenivāsacaritaṁ,Yathā byākari pacchime kāle.
thi16:1.0.520: p_19Th2_608"Bhagavati koṇāgamane,Saṁghārāmamhi navanivesamhi;Sakhiyo tisso janiyo,Vihāradānaṁ adāsimha.
thi16:1.0.521: p_19Th2_609Dasakkhattuṁ satakkhattuṁ,Dasasatakkhattuṁ satāni ca satakkhattuṁ;Devesu uppajjimha,Ko pana vādo manussesu.
thi16:1.0.522: p_19Th2_610Devesu mahiddhikā ahumha,Mānusakamhi ko pana vādo;Sattaratanassa mahesī,Itthiratanaṁ ahaṁ āsiṁ.
thi16:1.0.523: p_19Th2_611So hetu so pabhavo,Taṁ mūlaṁ sāva sāsane khantī;Taṁ paṭhamasamodhānaṁ,Taṁ dhammaratāya nibbānaṁ.
thi16:1.0.524: p_19Th2_612Evaṁ karonti ye sadda-Hanti vacanaṁ anomapaññassa;Nibbindanti bhavagate,Nibbinditvā virajjantī"ti.
